summary: This 2-day plan strategically builds Fixrupee's trust and brand awareness. Day 1 opens with a trust-building post establishing Fixrupee as a safe, professional loan and credit card aggregator. Day 2 anchors on Labour Day with a creative, emotionally resonant festival post that honors the working class while subtly reinforcing Fixrupee's mission of empowering people financially — tying hard work to smart financial decisions.
themes: Labour Day — Financial Empowerment for Every Worker

posts.title: Why 1 Lakh+ Indians Trust Fixrupee

posts.call_to_action: Check your free credit score at fixrupee.com
posts.image_prompt: Professional, ultra-detailed, HD corporate trust-building social media post for Fixrupee brand. Center composition: a glowing blue shield icon (#10b7fe) with a checkmark symbolizing security, surrounded by floating icons of a credit card, loan document, and credit score meter. Clean white (#ffffff) background with subtle geometric patterns. Text overlay: "YOUR FINANCES ARE SAFE WITH US" in bold modern sans-serif at top, Fixrupee logo at bottom. Professional & Authoritative tone, photorealistic 3D render style, sharp lighting, corporate blue (#10b7fe) and white (#ffffff) color scheme, 4:5 aspect ratio for Instagram.

posts.title: Labour Day — Saluting Every Hardworking Indian
posts.caption:
Every drop of sweat builds this nation. 🇮🇳💪

This Labour Day, Fixrupee salutes the spirit of every worker — from factory floors to office desks, from fields to freelancing.

Your hard work deserves smart financial rewards. 💙

🔹 Best credit cards for salaried professionals
🔹 Personal loans tailored to YOUR needs
🔹 Free credit score — because you've earned it

You work hard for your money. Let us make your money work harder for you. 🏗️

Happy Labour Day! ✊

🔗 fixrupee.com
posts.call_to_action: You deserve the best offers — visit fixrupee.com today
posts.image_prompt: Ultra-detailed, HD, professional Labour Day social media post for Fixrupee brand. Photorealistic 3D illustration: diverse Indian workers — construction worker with helmet, female office professional, farmer, delivery person — standing confidently together in heroic low-angle composition. Background: rising sun with golden rays, city skyline silhouette. Brand blue (#10b7fe) gradient overlay blending into white (#ffffff). Bold text overlay at top: "HAPPY LABOUR DAY" in white, subtext: "Your Hard Work Deserves Smart Financial Rewards" in #10b7fe. Fixrupee logo bottom-center. Professional & Authoritative tone, cinematic lighting, sharp details, 4:5 aspect ratio.
